Admissions Guide

Clear admissions flow from enquiry to application

This section is designed to help applicants prepare confidently, submit correctly, and follow up with the admissions office when support is needed.

Open Admissions Portal Downloads and Forms
Step-by-step

How to apply

Use this sequence to move from programme choice to official submission without missing key details.

Step 1

Choose your programme pathway

Review available certificate and diploma options, then identify the route that matches your academic and professional goals.

Step 2

Prepare required documents

Gather your academic records, identification details, and any supporting documents required for the selected intake.

Step 3

Apply online through the official portal

Submit your application on the official admissions portal and ensure all mandatory fields are completed accurately.

Step 4

Track updates and contact admissions

Follow communication from the institute and use the admissions contacts for guidance on deadlines and next steps.

Admissions Preparation Checklist

Keep these essentials ready before beginning your online application process.

  • National ID or valid identification details
  • Academic transcripts/results for relevant level
  • Passport-size photograph for application records
  • Active phone number and email for communication
  • Programme selection and preferred intake information

Direct Admissions Contacts

FAQs

Common questions from prospective applicants

Quick answers to frequent admissions and demo-deployment questions.

Can visitors apply online directly from the site?

Yes. The admissions page prominently links to the official online admissions portal and keeps downloadable application resources easy to find.

Is the demo suitable for client review on Netlify?

Yes. The codebase is static, lightweight, and prepared for quick deployment and review on Netlify.

Can official school photos replace the current asset pack later?

Yes. All local images can be swapped by replacing files in the public/images folders without rewriting page structure.

Take the next step

Submit your application through official channels

Use the admissions portal for final submission and reach the institute directly for clarifications on entry requirements.
